mnemonics: CAP Theorem: Choose any two from C, A, P - like picking two toppings for your distributed system pizza.
keyPoints: Understand the trade-offs in the CAP Theorem (Consistency, Availability, Partition Tolerance).
Know the differences between synchronous and asynchronous communication protocols.
Be able to explain consensus algorithms like Paxos and Raft and their role in distributed coordination.
commonMistakes: Assuming a system can be both CA, CP, and AP simultaneously - it can only guarantee two during a partition.
Confusing eventual consistency with strong consistency in system design answers.
Overlooking the importance of idempotent operations for handling retries in distributed transactions.
